site_name: FOUR RIVERS KENNEL, L L C

citations.narrative:
The facility did not submit an Annual Report (APHIS form 7023) for the fiscal year ending in 2025 to the Deputy
Administrator. This report was due by the extended deadline due date of December 31, 2025.
Every research facility is required to submit an Annual Report of animals used in the prior Federal fiscal year to the
Deputy Administrator by December 1st of each calendar year.
Timely submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate account of the total numbers of animals used
and to ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were followed during the
fiscal year.
Correct by submitting the FY 2025 Annual Report by March 3rd, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.36(a) 
   
Annual report. 
The facility did not submit an Annual Report (APHIS form 7023) for the fiscal year ending in 2025 to the Deputy 
Administrator. This report was due by the extended deadline due date of December 31, 2025.  
 
Every research facility is required to submit an Annual Report of animals used in the prior Federal fiscal year to the 
Deputy Administrator by December 1st of each calendar year.  
 
Timely submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate account of the total numbers of animals used 
and to ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were followed during the 
fiscal year.  
 
Correct by submitting the FY 2025 Annual Report by March 3rd, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
